name: protocols-benchmark
description: Benchmark visual de protocolos de comunicacao client-server em Node.js

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n REST,GRAPHQL,GRPC,WS,QUEUE,DASHBOARD -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue,white "node rest/server.js" "node graphql/server.js" "node grpc/server.js" "node websocket/server.js" "node queue/server.js" "node dashboard/server.js"
